name: AWS Bedrock
description: AWS Bedrock — managed foundation models via your AWS account. Supports Claude, Llama 3, Mistral, and Amazon Titan models.

setup_steps.text: Login to AWS Console and open Bedrock
Go to Model access and enable the models you need
Create an IAM user with AmazonBedrockFullAccess policy
Generate an Access Key and paste both key and secret here
Set region (e.g. us-east-1) in the credentials field as 'region'
